canonical_question: How do I implement the circuit breaker pattern?

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Resilience4j 2.0 (2023) replaced Hystrix as standard Java implementation; pattern itself unchanged since Nygard 2007

constraints: MUST create one circuit breaker instance per remote service/endpoint -- sharing a breaker across unrelated services masks failures
NEVER set failure threshold to 1 -- a single failure is not a pattern; minimum recommended is 3-5 failures
Open-state timeout (resetTimeout) MUST be long enough for downstream service to recover
ALWAYS implement a fallback strategy -- circuit breaker without fallback just returns errors faster
Circuit breaker MUST be combined with timeouts on the underlying call
NEVER apply circuit breakers to local/in-process calls -- breakers are for network boundaries only
